title: Virage Pipeline Config
description: Declarative JSON configuration for @vivantel/virage-core (V2 — providers + fileSets)

$schema.description: URL to this JSON Schema for IDE autocomplete.

version.description: Config schema version (semver). Bump when making breaking changes to this file.

fileSets.description: Named groups of files to index. At least one entry is required.

ignore.description: Global glob patterns excluded from all file sets (e.g. '**/node_modules/**').

agents.description: Agent plugins to configure (e.g. Claude Code, Copilot).

pluginRef.description: Reference to a virage plugin package.

packageVersion.description: Pinned version range (e.g. '~0.2.55'). Managed by virage update.

options.description: Plugin-specific options. Supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion in string values.

providersConfig.description: Provider plugins for embedding, vector storage, re-ranking, and file sourcing.

reranker.description: Optional re-ranker plugin for post-retrieval result reordering.

source.description: Optional global source provider. Overrides the default local-filesystem source for all file sets.

hybrid.description: Enable hybrid search (dense + sparse BM25/FTS). Default: false.

hybridAlpha.description: Blend weight: 0 = pure sparse, 1 = pure dense. Default: 0.5.

rerankOversample.description: Fetch topK × rerankOversample candidates before re-ranking. Default: 3.

fileSetConfig.description: A named group of files to index with specific chunkers.

name.description: Unique name for this file set.

source.description: Per-fileSet source provider override (overrides providers.source for this set).

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude for this file set.

tags.description: Tags injected into every chunk from this file set (e.g. ['lang:typescript']).

chunkers.description: One or more chunker plugins for this file set.

tagRule.description: Inject tags into chunks from files matching a glob pattern.

match.description: Minimatch glob pattern (relative to source root).

add.description: Tags to add when the pattern matches.

package.description: npm package name for the chunker (e.g. '@vivantel/virage-code-chunk-chunker').

packageVersion.description: Pinned version range. Managed by virage update.

chunkerTemplate.description: Custom Handlebars templates for chunk text generation.

denseText.description: Template for the dense text embedding target (inline string or path to a .hbs file).

sparseText.description: Template for the sparse text BM25/FTS target.

pipelineOptions.description: Throughput and concurrency tuning for the indexing pipeline. All fields are optional; CLI flags override config values.

embeddingsFile.description: Path to a pre-computed embeddings JSON file (skips the embedding step).

force.description: Re-embed all chunks, bypassing file-change detection and chunk-hash dedup.

skipUpload.description: Embed but skip uploading to the vector store.

dryRun.description: Show what would change without writing anything.

rateLimitMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between embedding API calls. Default: 0.

batchSize.description: Max chunks per embedding API request.

maxBatchChars.description: Max total characters per embedding API request.

concurrency.description: Number of files processed in parallel.

chunkConcurrency.description: Number of chunking workers per file.

minEmbeddingBatchSize.description: Minimum chunks to accumulate before sending an embedding request. Default: 10.

minUploadingBatchSize.description: Minimum chunks to accumulate before uploading to the vector store. Default: 20.

maxPendingFiles.description: Backpressure limit: max files queued for chunking before pausing file reads.

noBanner.description: Suppress the startup banner. Also configurable via VIRAGE_NO_BANNER=1.
